title: Push from Saudis, Israel helped move Trump to attack Iran
summary_full: President Trump launched a wide-ranging attack on Iran after weeks-long lobbying by an unusual pair of U.S. allies in the Middle East: Israel and Saudi Arabia.
summary_public: President Trump launched a wide-ranging attack on Iran after weeks-long lobbying by an unusual pair of U.S. allies in the Middle East: Israel and Saudi Arabia.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel helped move Trump to attack Iran

SA.label: negative
SA.evidence: Saudis, Israel helped move Trump to attack Iran
